constraint.name: ca_reports_boards_users_last_nick
constraint.type: FOREIGN KEY (last_nick) REFERENCES users (nick) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE

constraint.name: ca_reports_boards_users_nick
constraint.type: FOREIGN KEY (nick) REFERENCES users (nick) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE

constraint.name: ca_reports_boards_users
constraint.type: FOREIGN KEY (user_nick) REFERENCES users (nick) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE

constraint.name: ca_reports_boards_users_report_boards
constraint.type: FOREIGN KEY (id_report_board) REFERENCES reports_boards (id) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE
